figure_caption: per-scenario reduction or baseline-degradation threshold required to overturn the stronger programmable baseline, with unreopenable zero-volume/all-fallback regimes separated.

high_volume_stable_moderation.threshold_unit: pJ_equivalent/day for daily costs; fraction for percent/fallback/utilization; multiplier for multiplier fields
high_volume_stable_moderation.trace_contract_requirement: valid_reopen_candidate from M-TRACE-1 with measured hybrid and accelerator energy, measured baselines, nonzero accepted fast-path volume, audit logging, health/drift gates, and production or shadow-production environment

special_case_conclusions.missing_accelerator_baseline: blocked; best programmable baseline cannot be formed
special_case_conclusions.proxy_only_trace: blocked; proxy energy cannot satisfy M-TRACE-1 measured-energy requirement

threshold_inequality: measured_hybrid_total < measured_best_programmable_baseline under identical accepted-volume, fallback, audit, update, utilization, latency, and energy accounting
trace_contract: Only M-TRACE-1 valid_reopen_candidate traces with measured accelerator and hybrid energy can instantiate the threshold.

unit_metadata.note: Current rows are modeled/proxy thresholds, not measured production reopen evidence.
